feature: GarudaX Sprint: Fix e2e failures + Admin-UI CX
requirement: Fix the 6 e2e test failures (gateway middleware ordering, compliance KYC response format, cross-service response mismatches), merge T062 WebSocket hook, add loading/empty states to admin-ui, and verify all fixes with integration tests.

tasks.title: Fix gateway middleware ordering (auth before routing causes 401 on unknown paths)
tasks.description: The gateway's middleware chain runs Auth before Router. Unknown paths get 401 instead of 404. Fix by moving auth middleware to run AFTER routing, or add a pre-routing path-existence check that returns 404 for unregistered routes before auth runs. Run existing gateway tests to verify no regressions.

tasks.title: Fix compliance KYC endpoint response format (array vs object)
tasks.description: The compliance KYC submission endpoint returns a JSON array where e2e tests expect a JSON object. Investigate the handler: if it's a single-resource creation, return an object. If it's a list endpoint, update the e2e test expectations. Run compliance-service unit tests to verify.

tasks.title: Fix e2e test expectations for clearing/netting/margin/settlement endpoints
tasks.description: 4 e2e tests fail because they expect single objects but endpoints return arrays (which is correct for list endpoints). Update the e2e tests in tests/e2e/ to handle array responses from clearing positions, netting, margin calls, and settlement cycle endpoints. The services are correct — the tests need updating.

tasks.title: Merge T062 WebSocket hook from worktree branch
tasks.description: T062 (Admin UI WebSocket Real-Time Hook) was APPROVED by review (17 tests, zero required fixes) but never merged. Check for feature/T062-* worktree branch. Cherry-pick or merge the approved code into main. Verify the 17 tests pass after merge. This is the third instance of the merge-gate failure pattern.

tasks.title: Add loading spinners and empty states to admin-ui pages
tasks.description:
Add consistent loading and empty state UI to admin-ui pages that currently show blank screens while data loads or when no data exists. Pages: monitoring, orderbook, positions, risk, margin, settlement, compliance, audit, tickets. Use existing component patterns from the project.

CX ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA (all must pass):
[] Loading state: shows skeleton/spinner while data loads
[] Empty state: meaningful message when no data exists (not blank screen)
[] Error state: user-friendly error message with retry action (not raw error dump)
[] Responsive: works on mobile (375px), tablet (768px), desktop (1280px+)
[] Keyboard navigation: all interactive elements reachable via Tab, activatable via Enter/Space
[] Accessible: proper ARIA labels, semantic HTML (nav, main, button not div), color contrast 4.5:1+
[] Toast/feedback: user actions produce visible confirmation
[] No raw technical errors visible to user (no stack traces, no undefined, no NaN)
[] Consistent styling: uses project design tokens/theme, not arbitrary colors/sizes

tasks.title: CX review: admin-ui loading/empty/error states
tasks.description: Review T105 implementation against the CX checklist. Score each of the 10 items as pass/fail. Fix any gaps directly in the code. Target: CX score >= 7/10. Write handoff with CX score and fixes made.

tasks.title: Integration test: verify all 6 previously failing e2e tests pass
tasks.description: Run the full e2e test suite after T101-T103 fixes. Verify that all 6 previously failing tests now pass: (1) gateway unknown path 404, (2) compliance KYC format, (3-6) clearing/netting/margin/settlement response handling. Report pass/fail/skip counts. Run Go unit tests too to verify no regressions.
